rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Metasploit Wrap-Up 03/20/2026
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:

            - '*docs.metasploit.com*'
            - '*leakix.net*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
